metadata.description: Design Builder plugin marketplace — 4-command design tooling for Claude Code, with inspiration_pages-driven page generation

plugins.name: design-builder
plugins.description: 4 commands (/setup, /create, /improve, /review) for web + iOS design. Knowledge-base skill backed by designlib MCP (inspiration_pages, palettes, styles, fonts), iOS HIG refs, designer motion perspectives, anti-pattern detection.
